task: i think you should be able to do ssh root@ashburn and do all of this for me

to do this as of now I need you to update opencode cli to latest by doing opencode upgrade and then do OPENCODE_EXPERIMENTAL_WORKSPACES=true opencode
so that the feature is enabled, also that server alr has cf tunnel which has opencode web running also see if we dont mess up that and then ideally bind the local host on the server w cf tunnel so I can attach it to my opencode here on my mac
user_feedback_text:
to do this as of now I need you to update opencode cli to latest by doing opencode upgrade and then do OPENCODE_EXPERIMENTAL_WORKSPACES=true opencode
so that the feature is enabled, also that server alr has cf tunnel which has opencode web running also see if we dont mess up that and then ideally bind the local host on the server w cf tunnel so I can attach it to my opencode here on my mac
